title: redundant-import-alias
description: "Remove aliases equal to package names."
sidebar:
  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Remove aliases equal to package names. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
import strings "strings"
```

## Good

```go
import "strings"
```
